title: Junk Food Additions
description: This mod adds a ton of junk food to your Minecraft experience!
body:
![Kinetic Hosting Promo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2ceccee7a5e7c9cc7b5392136f2a66bec22314c.png)

## [Save 15% For The First Month on Your Next Server!—Use Code **_Paragon_** and Click Here to Get Started!](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=910)

Introducing a new mod that brings a variety of real-world junk food into your game! This addition includes familiar favorites like sausages, fries, and burgers. Each item is designed to resemble its real-world counterpart, providing a straightforward and enjoyable element to your gaming experience. Now, you can navigate through your adventures with a tasty snack in hand or simply enjoy these classic foods while exploring the virtual world. It's a simple, fun way to add a bit more flavor to your game without getting too complex. Enjoy the straightforward pleasure of having these well-known comfort foods in your digital environment!


[Click Here to see Curseforge Version](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/junk-food-additions)
